Home / Compare / Dao Coffee
commercial arabica single-origin highland Chiang Rai

Dao Coffee

ดาวคอฟฟี่

4.0
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
430 reviews
Origin Chiang Rai Highlands
Roast Levels light medium dark
Price Range ฿95–160 / 200g
Founded 1995
Formats ground, whole bean, drip bag

Grown in the high-altitude terraces of Chiang Rai, Dao Coffee champions highland arabica from northern Thai hill tribes. A pioneer in bringing quality arabica to mainstream Thai supermarkets.

Flavor Profile

Smooth highland arabica with bright acidity and floral hints. Gentle sweetness, notes of citrus blossom and mild stone fruit, clean finish.

Tasting Notes

citrus blossom stone fruit mild sweetness clean finish

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
4/5
Sweetness
3/5
Bitterness
2/5
Aroma
4/5
